meanings.definition: decrease in size, extent, or range
examples: The amount of homework decreased towards the end of the semester
her weight fell to under a hundred pounds
his voice fell to a whisper

meanings.definition: lessen the authority, dignity, or reputation of
(of an organ or body part) diminished in size or strength as a result of disease or injury or lack of use
examples: partial paralysis resulted in an atrophied left arm

meanings.definition: (of musical intervals) reduction by a semitone of any perfect or minor musical interval
made to seem smaller or less (especially in worth)
examples: her comments made me feel small
